creator: gjb@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to gustavo.scalet from comment #7)
> (In reply to Glen Barber from comment #6)
> Do you see any problems by providing these conveniences by default on GCE?

No, but I am wondering if we want to (or should) also include the lang/python port as well, which would create the /usr/local/bin/python symbolic link to what the ${PYTHON_DEFAULT} version is.
